generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancyDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor embedded in building to capture real-time occupancy data via bidirectional feedback loops for adaptive control policies in BOREALIS project"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientLightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor embedded in building to capture real-time lighting conditions for adaptive control and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance CarbonDioxideMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ monitor embedded in building to capture air quality metrics for occupant health and ventilation optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled temperature and humidity sensor transmitting data via Eclipse Hono middleware for climate control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled motion sensor providing occupancy patterns for adaptive lighting and HVAC control via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyDetector
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientLightSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CarbonDioxideMonitor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance MotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic 3D representation of building geometry, components, and relationships in IFC or proprietary BIM format serving as foundational semantic backbone"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTransformationEngine
]

instance RuntimeDeviceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Device configurations extracted from BIM via model-driven transformations including tenant IDs, endpoint addresses, and control logic for lighting/HVAC"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance SensorDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured schemas for IoT sensor readings (temperature, occupancy, CO₂) ingested via Eclipse Hono for real-time processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning or rule-based policies for adaptive lighting stored in Eclipse Ditto runtime environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D assets rendered in Unreal Engine for real-time monitoring and stakeholder interaction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineRenderer
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns captured by IoT sensors used for adaptive control policy adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveControlEngine
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light measurements used for dynamic lighting control and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightingOptimizationService
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Air quality metrics for occupant health and ventilation system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VentilationControlSystem
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity readings for climate control optimization via Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClimateControlService
]

instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy patterns from motion sensors used for adaptive building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OccupancyBasedControl
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware for secure data ingestion and device management enabling bidirectional communication with physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables IoTDataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime platform for device twin management, state synchronization, and service orchestration in the DT system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceTwinService
]

instance UnrealEngineRenderer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization engine providing interactive monitoring dashboards for stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance BIMTransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating BIM-to-DT artifacts generation using M2M and M2T techniques"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTransformationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework for training adaptive control policies (e.g., BOREALIS lighting optimization) on operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance EclipseKubernetesOrchestrator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container orchestration platform enabling horizontal scaling of DT services for large-scale infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceScalingService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine enabling stakeholders to inspect sensor data and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupantComfortVisualization, EnergyConsumptionDashboard
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of reinforcement learning models for optimizing energy consumption, visual comfort, and occupant health"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendations, ComfortAnalytics
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven generation of runtime interfaces for seamless device integration and control logic deployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceIntegrationService, ControlLogicDeployment
]

instance ServiceExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for custom plugins (energy management, predictive maintenance)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PluginDevelopmentService
]

instance LifecycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Support for post-occupancy data-driven improvements refining control policies and DT models iteratively"
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyRefinementService
]

instance IoTDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Secure ingestion of sensor data from physical systems via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataValidationService
]

instance DeviceTwinService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of device twins including state synchronization and runtime configuration"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinStateManagement
]

instance AdaptiveControlEngine : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime service implementing reinforcement learning-based control policies for adaptive building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyExecutionService
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupantComfortVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizations of thermal/visual comfort metrics informing design adjustments for occupant well-being"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized energy consumption reports for lighting/HVAC systems based on occupancy and reinforcement learning predictions"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendations : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggestions for adjusting lighting policies to achieve energy savings based on operational data analysis"
]

instance ComfortAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed analytics on occupant comfort metrics to inform long-term design and operational improvements"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Early warnings for sensor/actuator failures detected through anomaly analysis in operational data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PolicyRefinementSuggestion : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendations for updating control logic based on post-occupancy data-driven insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DeviceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime interfaces for seamless integration of new BCS devices"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogicDeployment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deployment of control logic to physical actuators via Eclipse Ditto and Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance SmartLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting actuator configured via BIM-enriched models to execute adaptive lighting control logic derived from DT"
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC valve actuator interfacing with DT runtime via Eclipse Ditto for climate control optimization"
]

instance WindowShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Window shade actuator controlled through DT's bidirectional feedback loops for energy efficiency"
]

instance BuildingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "PLC or IoT gateway interfacing with DT's runtime middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for command translation"
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized-decentralized hybrid architecture for building infrastructure digital twin"
    base:contains BIMCoreModel, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngineRenderer, EclipseHono
]

instance PhysicalBuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    base:contains OccupancyDetector, SmartLightingActuator, BuildingController
]

// C5: Component Relationships
instance BIMEnrichmentRule : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automated metadata extraction rules from BIM models ensuring consistent data mapping to DT"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicy : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Adaptive control policy trained on operational data for dynamic building system optimization"
    base:isContainedIn AdaptiveControlEngine
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component managing post-occupancy data-driven updates to DT models and control policies"
    base:isContainedIn LifecycleManagementService
]

instance ModelToModelTransformer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "M2M transformation engine converting BIM artifacts to DT runtime configurations"
    base:isContainedIn BIMTransformationEngine
]

instance ModelToTextGenerator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "M2T generator creating runtime interfaces and device configurations from BIM models"
    base:isContainedIn BIMTransformationEngine
]

// Additional required instances for relationships
instance LightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing lighting control based on occupancy and light data"
]

instance VentilationControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System for controlling ventilation based on CO2 data and occupancy patterns"
]

instance ClimateControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing climate control based on temperature and humidity data"
]

]

    base:desc "Service for transforming BIM models to DT artifacts"
]

    base:desc "Service for configuring devices based on BIM data"
]

    base:desc "Service for managing device registries and configurations"
]

    base:desc "Service for synchronizing device states in the DT"
]

    base:desc "Service for providing real-time visualization capabilities"
]

    base:desc "Service for enabling stakeholder interaction with the DT"
]

    base:desc "Service for training control policies using reinforcement learning"
]

    base:desc "Service for executing adaptive control policies"
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Service for securely ingesting IoT data"
]

instance TwinStateManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through:
  - **Bidirectional communication protocols** between the DT (hosted on **Eclipse Ditto**) and physical actuators via **Eclipse Hono**, ensuring low-latency command execution.
  - **Control logic generation** from BIM-enriched models, where **device configurations** (e.g., lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) are automatically translated into executable commands for physical systems.
  - **Reinforcement learning-based control policies** (e.g., in the **BOREALIS** project) that dynamically adjust building operations based on real-time feedback, with adjustments propagated back to physical actuators. The framework supports **runtime reconfiguration** of these interactions without redeployment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time and event-driven**, with synchronization occurring at:
  - **Millisecond to second intervals** for critical control loops (e.g., HVAC adjustments, lighting responses to occupancy).
  - **Sub-second latency** for sensor data ingestion via **Eclipse Hono**, ensuring near-instantaneous updates to the DT.
  - **Batch processing intervals** (e.g., hourly/daily) for analytics and optimization services (e.g., energy consumption reports, reinforcement learning policy updates).
  The framework supports **asynchronous event processing** for non-critical services (e.g., logging, visualization updates)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM Backbone**: Central repository for **static and dynamic models**, serving as the semantic foundation.
  - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** handles **device connectivity**, **data routing**, and **state management**.
  - **Control Layer**: Implements **reinforcement learning** and **rule-based policies** for adaptive building operations.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine** provides **interactive 3D monitoring** and **stakeholder interfaces**.
  - **Extension Points**: Standardized APIs for **custom services** (e.g., energy analytics, predictive maintenance) developed by **DT Engineers**.
  The constellation supports **modular upgrades** and **service composition**, enabling incremental evolution of the DT over time."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **multiple lifecycle stages**, covering:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **device metadata** and control logic for initial DT configuration.
  - **Construction phase**: Physical sensors and actuators are commissioned, and their data models are synchronized with the DT via **Eclipse Hono**.
  - **Operation phase**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and performance optimization** (e.g., via reinforcement learning in **BOREALIS**).
  - **Maintenance/Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports **predictive maintenance** and **post-occupancy analysis** to inform retrofits and upgrades.
  The system aligns with **BIM’s lifecycle support**, ensuring continuity from **as-designed** (ideal) to **as-operated** (real-world) representations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: BIM models are **formally validated** (e.g., via **IFC schemas**) before transformation into DT artifacts.
  - **Data Synchronization**: **Eclipse Ditto’s state reconciliation** mechanisms ensure consistency between physical and virtual representations.
  - **ODTE Metric**: Evaluates **digital twin entanglement** by quantifying alignment between physical and virtual states (e.g., sensor readings vs. DT predictions).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework accounts for **sensor noise** and **control delays** via probabilistic models (e.g., Bayesian inference) in adaptive policies.
  - **Verification**: **Unit tests** for runtime components and **integration tests** for IoT middleware ensure correctness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **DT technical connection** uses:
  - **MQTT/S** protocol via **Eclipse Hono** for **secure IoT communication**, ensuring low-latency data exchange between sensors/actuators and the DT.
  - **RESTful APIs** exposed by **Eclipse Ditto** for **device twin management** and **state queries**.
  - **WebSockets** for **real-time visualization updates** in **Unreal Engine**.
  - **Kafka or similar event streams** for **asynchronous data processing** (e.g., analytics pipelines).
  The architecture supports **hybrid connectivity**, combining **wired (Ethernet)** and **wireless (LoRa, Zigbee)** protocols for heterogeneous device integration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is **cloud-hosted** with **scalable deployment** via:
  - **Eclipse Ditto** running on **Kubernetes** or **Docker containers** for **elastic scaling** of device twins and services.
  - **Unreal Engine** deployed as a **web-based or standalone application** for visualization, accessible via **HTTP/HTTPS**.
  - **Eclipse Hono** integrated as a **microservice** within the DT’s middleware stack, ensuring **low-latency IoT ingestion**.
  The framework supports **on-premise deployment** for privacy-sensitive environments, with **data encryption** (TLS) and **role-based access control (RBAC)** for security."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with:
  - **ERP/CRM Systems**: Via **API gateways** to link building operations with financial or HR data (e.g., occupancy trends).
  - **Other Digital Twins**: Standardized **OPC UA** or **MQTT** interfaces enable **cross-DT communication** for multi-building campuses.
  - **Building Management Systems (BMS)**: Integration with **proprietary BMS platforms** (e.g., Siemens Desigo) via **middleware adapters**.
  - **Cloud Platforms**: **AWS IoT Core** or **Azure Digital Twins** for **scalable, cloud-native deployment** of DT services.
  The framework uses **modular adapters** to ensure **plug-and-play compatibility** with external systems."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed as follows:
  - **Data Ownership**: The **physical asset owner** retains control over **sensor data** and **building operation logs**, while the DT service provider manages **runtime models** and **control policies**.
  - **Privacy Measures**:
    - **Anonymization** of occupant data (e.g., aggregated occupancy trends instead of individual records).
    - **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)** in **Eclipse Ditto** to restrict data access by stakeholder roles (e.g., Facility Managers vs. DT Engineers).
    - **GDPR compliance** for personal data, with **data retention policies** enforced via middleware configurations.
  The framework supports **federated data models** to allow **partial data sharing** while preserving ownership boundaries."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards**:
  - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for semantic interoperability and **OpenBIM** for collaborative modeling.
  - **IoT Standards**: **Eclipse Hono** (OASIS IoT standards), **MQTT/S** for secure messaging, and **OPC UA** for industrial communication.
  - **Digital Twin Standards**: **ISO/IEC 42010** for system modeling, **ISO/IEC 42020** for DT architecture, and **ITU-T X.1500** for DT lifecycle management.
  - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto** (based on **CSA IoT standards**) for device twin management.
  The framework includes **standardized extension points** to ensure compatibility with **AECO-specific tools** (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) and **industrial IoT platforms**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Authentication/Authorization**: **OAuth 2.0** and **JWT tokens** for secure access to DT services via **Eclipse Ditto**.
  - **Data Encryption**: **TLS 1.3** for all communications (IoT, APIs, visualization) and **AES-256** for stored data.
  - **Network Segmentation**: **Microsegmentation** in cloud deployments to isolate DT services from other systems.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Fail-safe controls**: DT-generated commands include **fallback logic** to revert to default states if errors occur.
    - **Human-in-the-loop validation**: Critical operations (e.g., emergency shutdowns) require **manual approval** via Facility Manager interfaces.
    - **Anomaly Detection**: **Reinforcement learning models** flag unsafe states (e.g., HVAC malfunctions) for immediate intervention.
  The framework prohibits **remote execution of unsafe operations** without **multi-factor authentication (MFA)** and **audit logging**."
]
